transcript.clean_text: stage eighteen of the jittered italia saw a brilliant day for the breakaway won by dhrista bont his first world tour and grand tour stage richard karapas stayed in the pink jersey and they all headed to stage 19 with two mountain stages remaining just three seconds between first and second on the gc that 19th stage would see the riders leave the seaside and head to the mountains richard calapas hoping for another good day he went to sign in with his mates with mikael lander just a minute and five seconds away and jai hindley in very very close proximity so they left sun shining and marano lagunade was the venue for the start a flattish first 60 or 70 kilometers through bouya hometown of alessandro de marquis before two third category climbs the mighty kolovrat in slovenia a first cat climb and then an ascension for the first time ever in the history of the gerald italia to the santuario de castelmonte a good stage 178 kilometers another test with 3 500 meters of climbing to do plenty of the usual suspects are trying to get in the break including magnus court looking for success today after finishing third from that winning breakaway 25 kilometer pass once the break was established hour of racing saw them have almost 12 minutes of a gap but then borah hands grower decided to ride it seemed as though the peloton have been happy to let the breakaway have their day and when fernando gabirio won the intermediate sprint at booyah from the 12-man breakaway that'd been established it was all in the balance alessandro de marquis didn't manage to make the break but he still had time to see his family on the side of the road once the climbing started kuhn balman went to work again in the break and looking to tick off the king of the mountains competition he'd take points but richie port would take his leave of the race ill suffering with a bout of suspected gastroenteritis he'd already be distance when the road went uphill in the final 62 kilometers the gap at eight and a half minutes it looked increasingly like the break would have its day again affini and ballerini doing a great job to increase the advantage on the flat affinity would be dropped at the bottom of the climb as with the sprinters and it'd soon be clear who'd have the legs to fight it out for the stage win baumann and falter looked the strongest tonnelli had to work his way back on then drama would join them as well with schmidt always in the act five riders came towards the final climb of the day just over 10 kilometers to go as they approached chibi dale del friuli behind it had all calmed down in the malayalza group no splits and bora retreating from the front nervous and cagey the atmosphere on the final climb a few attacks came inside the final three kilometers and it looked as though there might have been attack coming from the gc group pavel sivakov the last man for cara paza karapa has launched but once again at this tier of italia there was hardly anything to separate karapaz hinley and lander all this was going on as the stage was playing out up the road lander did get a small gap but the other two managed to close it and in the final corner this happened baumann around the corner then drama going into the barriers and balm winning a stage for the second time in this chiro-dania maro schmidt finishing second third place on the day going to bardiani's tonnelli in the general classification just a couple of minutes behind it would be as we were the final sprint to the line from karapaz matched by hindley and lander a few more seconds going and disappearing into the distance for the likes of hit nebulae and bilbao just three seconds between first and second a minute and five between first and third and all heading into the final mountain stage with perhaps a time trial to decide things on the last day kun bowman decided that a second stage went his way mardus schmidt was a little unhappy about how it played out in that final corner but the results stood and barman won for the second time in this particular judo so no grand tour stage wins a couple of weeks ago he now has two and providing he stays on his bike all the way to vidona he also has the king of the mountains competition an unassailable lead mathematically now in the climber's jersey so the malaya zura should belong to kun bauman at the end of the giro d'italia stage 19 certainly belongs to him he's finished top of the pile almost four minutes to the gc group that came over the line and that gc group will fight it out again on one of the hardest stages of the whole race the dolomitic monster stage that's to come on stage 20 and these will be the gaps going into it an amazing 17 minutes 10 seconds between first and tenth but only three single seconds between karapas and hindley in first and second 105 the podium and it's all the playful as they leave belluno a five-star stage heading up the paso san pele and following that the passo fedaya to the top the marmolada to finish the climbing at this jira d'italia before the final time trial around verona on stage 21. a huge fight for the break expected an even bigger fight for the stage and the maliarosa 168 kilometers for the final road stage of the jedi italia you'll be able to see it live and on demand gcn plus discovery plus and on the television on eurosport we look forward to you joining us
